title: Checkout regression after a release chain
userProblemStatement: Checkout worked before the latest release chain and now fails after multiple steps.

evidence.rawText:
2026-04-09T00:00:00Z service=api requestId=req-800 GET /api/checkout
Error: regression failed
    at submitCheckout (/srv/checkout.js:44:9)
The issue started after the release that changed checkout validation and async job retry behavior.
